_comment: WCAG-AA axe-core violations floor. The a11y e2e test (e2e/test_a11y_violations_floor.py) runs axe-core over key surfaces and fails when violations exceed these caps. critical/serious are held at 0 from the start; moderate/minor start generous (third-party widgets: Bootstrap, CodeMirror, cytoscape) and RATCHET DOWN as the frontend a11y waves land. Lower a number here when a fix removes violations; never raise one without a reason.
